title: SEASONAL TREES
description:
It's a simple seasonal texture pack that help to provide 5 season trees.
after applying this texture pack after a certain period of time its change the seasons.
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
[SEASONAL TREES] texture pack.
It's a simple seasonal texture pack that help to provide 5 season trees.
after applying this texture pack after a certain period of time its change the seasons.
there are 5 seasons, every season have different colour leaves.
every season changed the leaves colours.
startig with green, red , orange , yellow and ending with white.

Time duration of each season is between 7-9 minutes.

this pack is compatible with various shaders, with great potential.
this pack optimized the minecarft graphics into smooth and adaptable graphics.
this pack make your game smooth and stable for gameplay.
it's based of minecraft simple and coloured graphics.


THERE ARE MANY CHANGES IN THE GRAPHICS
CHANGES ARE -
1)all blocks
2)all trees
3)all leaves
4)all doors
5)all planks
7)environment
8)sun
9)moon
10)all types of veins
11)all types of plants
12)all types of underwater plants
13)all types of sand
14)all gui materials
15)particles
16)rain
17)snowfall

version supported
form- 1.16 to latest

 

compatible with both single world and servers.

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files

 

enjoy the pack
make your minecraft.

THANKS FOR DOWNLOADIND.
